title: KEI HONG HON PA ASI LUANGIN

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kei hong Hon-pa A si Luangin,
Tang-tel bang bek kei ma a ding
Lamdang hehpih na leh it na,
Bang tawh teh thei ding maw?
Kei zong singlamteh ka muh ciang,
Lungdam na tawh lung neh no-in,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ahih hang khitui tak na in,
Topa ka pumpi kong pia hi,
